column.name: MANDT
column.description: Client

column.name: BLART
column.description: Document Type

column.name: NUMKR
column.description: Number Range

column.name: KOARS
column.description: Account Types Allowed

column.name: STBLA
column.description: Document Type

column.name: XNETB
column.description: Indicator: Document posted net ?

column.name: XRVUP
column.description: Indicator: Posting from SAP billing document ?

column.name: XSYBL
column.description: Indicator: Document type can only be used in batch input

column.name: XVORK
column.description: Indicator: Document type for initial account assignment ?

column.name: XKKPR
column.description: Indicator: Only one customer/vendor allowed

column.name: XGSUB
column.description: Inter-company posting

column.name: XMGES
column.description: Indicator: Trading partner can be entered manually

column.name: BRGRU
column.description: Authorization Group

column.name: RECID
column.description: Debit Recovery Indicator

column.name: RECIC
column.description: Recovery Indicator Credit

column.name: XMTXT
column.description: Indicator: Document header text

column.name: XMREF
column.description: Indicator: Reference number

column.name: XNGBK
column.description: Indicator: Document type for posting subsequent adjustment

column.name: KURST
column.description: Exch.Rate Type for Determining the Proposed Rate

column.name: XNEGP
column.description: Indicator: Negative Postings Permitted

column.name: XKOAA
column.description: Indicator: Are postings to assets permitted?

column.name: XKOAD
column.description: Indicator: Are postings to customer permitted?

column.name: XKOAK
column.description: Indicator: Are Postings to Supplier Permitted?

column.name: XKOAM
column.description: Indicator: Are postings to material account permitted?

column.name: XKOAS
column.description: Indicator: Are postings to G/L account permitted?

column.name: XNMRL
column.description: Document Type Relevant for Official Numbering

column.name: XAUSG
column.description: Self-Issued Document

column.name: XDTCH
column.description: Check Posting Date when Issuing Official Document Number

column.name: BLKLS
column.description: Document Class

column.name: XROLLUP
column.description: Indicator: Document type allowed for rollup

column.name: XPLAN
column.description: Indicator: Document type allowed for planning

column.name: XALLOCACT
column.description: Indicator: Document type allowed for actual allocation

column.name: XALLOCPLAN
column.description: Indicator: Document type allowed for plan allocation

column.name: X_PP_PROCESS
column.description: Indicator: Exchange rate diffs partial payments by period

column.name: XKURSX
column.description: Indicator: Market Data Exchange Rate

column.name: XPOSACC
column.description: Indicator: Allow Posting to Position or Equivalent Accounts

column.name: XUACPA
column.description: Accounting Principle Assignment Is Unique in Document

column.name: XMREF2
column.description: Long Invoice Reference Required
